notes: v2.4.16 — Purchasing live-sync indicators and faster requisition-to-PO conversion. A green 'Live' dot now appears on the Requisitions and Purchase Orders tables and inside the requisition and purchase-order detail windows whenever real-time sync is connected, so you can tell at a glance you're seeing up-to-the-second data. The 'Convert to PO' action has moved into the requisition window's header so it's reachable from any tab, and it now hides automatically once a requisition has already been converted. Includes the underlying real-time rendering and inline-save refinements from this cycle.
